ConnectionStrings.//: PROD: do NOT hard-code. Provide via env var ConnectionStrings__DefaultConnection (PostgreSQL). A 'postgres://user:pass@host:port/db' URL is accepted and normalized for Npgsql.

Jwt.//SigningKey: PROD: provide via env var Jwt__SigningKey (>= 32 chars). Never commit.

MarketData.//Provider: Finnhub | TwelveData | Mock. TwelveData's free tier includes historical candles (live charts + signals); Finnhub free has live quotes only.
MarketData.//ApiKey: Key for the selected provider. Provide via user-secrets locally or env var MarketData__ApiKey in prod. Empty => mock data.
